description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image. Define a GRADLE_OPTS variable set to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false and a before_script that makes gradlew executable, writes mvnMakerTimUsername=$MVN_USER and mvnMakerTimPassword=$MVN_PASS to gradle.properties, and appends globVersion=1.$(git rev-list --all --count). Set two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs ./gradlew test. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs ./gradlew publish. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
